title: Y and en with past and future
subtitle: Use y and en beyond the present tense.
duolingoBridge: This makes A2 answers shorter and more natural.
overview: Knowledge point 1: y/en usually come before the helper verb in passé composé.
Knowledge point 2: with aller + infinitive, they come before the infinitive.

sections.title: Y/en tense map
rows: I am going to go there.
I am going to buy some.

items.fr: Hier, j’y suis allé avec mon frère.
items.en: Yesterday, I went there with my brother.
items.es: Ayer fui allí con mi hermano.

items.en: Tomorrow, I am going to go back there.

items.fr: Tu vas en parler au professeur ?
items.en: Are you going to talk about it to the teacher?
items.es: ¿Vas a hablar de eso con el profesor?

items.fr: J’en ai besoin pour le travail.
